title: demorchis appendiculata
side_effects: Demorchis appendiculata can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps due to its toxic alkaloid compounds. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to liver and kidney damage, causing symptoms like dark urine, fatigue, and loss of appetite. In severe cases, the plant can cause respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and coughing, especially when inhaled as a powder or smoke. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the demorchis appendiculata plant for any health benefits.
